common.tagline: Gospodăriile furnizează energie regenerabilă. Rețeaua le plătește înapoi.

home.heroEyebrow: Live · Rețeaua Poolwatt · actualizat la fiecare 60 s
home.heroSubtitle: Poolwatt este o piață peer-to-peer unde gospodăriile vând energie regenerabilă stocată în baterii. Fiecare kilowatt-oră din rețea provine din solar, eolian, hidro sau biomasă — și putem dovedi acest lucru.

newsflow.subtitle: Latest renewable-energy headlines · refreshed every 30 min

listing.search: Caută după nume, oraș sau operator…

footer.dataNote: Telemetrie live de la flota de producători, agregată de grid worker-ul Poolwatt. Frecvență: 60 s prețuri, 5 min stare de încărcare, 30 min meteo.

navigator.title: Stații de încărcare EV
navigator.metaDescription: Găsește stații de încărcare pentru vehicule electrice în apropiere cu specificații tehnice complete.
navigator.noStations: Nu există stații în această zonă. Deplasează harta pentru a căuta.
navigator.errorLoad: Could not load stations. Retrying with a different source…

bot.siblingNote: Bot-ul Telegram @PoolwattBot trimite alerte în timp real și permite producătorilor să publice oferte direct de pe telefon.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Pick a nickname and a password — that's all you need to start.
register.emailNote: You can add an email later in your cabinet for password recovery. Without an email, a forgotten password cannot be reset.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in with your nickname and password.

addEmailBanner.title: Add an email for password recovery
addEmailBanner.body: Without an email we can't help you recover a forgotten password.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.emptyProducersBody: Open the [producer list] and tap the star on a card to save it here.
favorites.emptyChargersBody: Open the [navigator] and tap the star on a charger to save it here.

charger.buildRouteHint: Opens in your device's default maps app.

email.title: Recovery email
email.none: No email on file. Add one so you can recover your password later.
email.pendingNote: Without an email, a forgotten password cannot be reset — there's no other way to identify you.
email.successPending: Verification email sent. Click the link to confirm.

danger.title: Delete account
danger.warning: This wipes your favorites and signs you out. Cannot be undone.

ok.title: Email confirmed
ok.body: You can now use it to recover your password if you forget it.

expired.title: Link expired
expired.body: Verification links last one hour. Request a new one from settings.

missing.title: Missing token
missing.body: This link is incomplete. Try opening it again from your email.

notfound.title: Link not found
notfound.body: This verification link is no longer valid.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your nickname or email — we'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.success: If that account has a verified email, we sent a reset link.
forgotPassword.noEmail: This account has no verified email — recovery is not possible. Contact support via @poolwattbot.
forgotPassword.unknown: We don't recognize that nickname or email.

expired.title: Link expired or used
expired.body: Reset links work once and last one hour.
